yesterdayAnalysis: Monday's pool swim (1,500m, TSS 13, HR 104) was executed perfectly as the final pool session before Oregon. Easy effort with race-pace 4x50s kept the athlete sharp without accumulating fatigue. Heart rate and duration both indicate appropriate intensity for race week minus 5 days.
todayRecommendation: Execute today's easy spin (20 min) and easy 2-mile run with 4x20sec strides exactly as planned. This is about neuromuscular activation and feeling fast, not fitness — keep HR under 125 and enjoy the leg turnover on the strides.
weekProgress: Week 13 of 13: Currently at 33 TSS of 150 target (22%) with 5 days remaining including today. This is perfectly on-track for race week — no major sessions are scheduled until Friday's bike check and the week is deliberately front-loaded with easy work. Travel Thursday means minimal TSS accumulation, which is appropriate taper protocol.
keyInsight: You're 5 days out from Oregon 70.3 in textbook taper mode — fitness is banked from 124 activities and 13 brick sessions, now it's all about freshness, travel logistics, and mental preparation.
positives: Sleep quality rebounding nicely: 83 score with 8.2h duration and 133min REM on Sunday night shows good recovery
